arts.ttl: PSG to Extend Nike Kit Deal Until 2039, Marking 50 Years
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain is reportedly finalizing an extension to their long-standing partnership with Nike, which will see the collaboration continue until 2039.

If they decide to revisit that pursuit, they won’t be the only ones in the race. arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are shifting their focus to Ligue 1’s rising stars as they look to reshape their squad with younger, more dynamic players. Recent signings like Bradley Barcola and Desire Doue from domestic rivals reflect this change in strategy. arts.ttl: Arsenal suffer major suspension blow ahead of PSG Champions League semi-final
arts.sum: Arsenal will have to play without influential midfielder Thomas Partey in the first leg of their Champions League semi-final against Paris Saint-Germain later this month.
